title: dryopteris viscosa
intro: Dryopteris viscosa, also known as sticky wood fern or fly fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris viscosa include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Dryopteris viscosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
